title: Joining the Indivisible Palo Alto Plus Signal Community
description:
Thank you for your interest in joining the IPA+ Signal community! Our Signal members have full access to our activities and communications. Being on Signal allows you to receive updates and discuss what is happening with other members in real time.

We ask for the information below for safety purposes, as well as to understand which Signal channels would be most interesting for you.

fields.label: What personal skill or experience do you bring to the group? Everyone brings something! Feel free to share your LinkedIn profile if you like.
fields.placeholder: This helps us connect people to each other and to understand the skills and experience in the group.

fields.label: Do you have a main area of interest? If so, please share.
Do you have experience with Signal?
Which of the following specialty Signal channels would you like to join, if any? Everyone is added to Announcements, Good News, Actions & Events, and Help Desk.

options.label: Billionaire Takedown at Tesla peaceful protest
